2025 Season

 2024 Season2025 Season2026 Season 

Odds courtesy of Pro-Football-Reference.com and are the closing odds.

Please let others know about our site. If you use data from Covers’ Sports Odds History for an article, social media post or research for a podcast/broadcast, please reference and link to our site. Thanks!
